1.Title: Decibel Monologue
1.Description: While not the active character, the equipper's Energy Regen increases by <color=#2BAD00>0.6</color>/s. When the equipper uses an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> and deals <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>, all squad members gain a buff that increases DMG dealt by <color=#2BAD00>12.5%</color> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. At 2 stacks, characters gain an additional <color=#2BAD00>10%</color> ATK. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
